name: sarvam_translate
description: Translate between 22 Indian languages and English using Sarvam AI. Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Odia, Punjabi, and more.
contextual_description: Sarvam AI multilingual translation supporting all 22 scheduled Indian languages plus English. Auto-detects source language. Handles code-mixing.
